title: Amazon Linux 2023 - ALAS2023-2026-1813: Important priority package update for amazon-ssm-agent
description:
Package updates are available for Amazon Linux 2023 that fix the following vulnerabilities:
CVE-2026-33814:
	When processing HTTP/2 SETTINGS frames, transport will enter an infinite loop of writing CONTINUATION frames if it receives a SETTINGS_MAX_FRAME_SIZE with a value of 0.
